description: The static build-matrix — the default capability-provider implementation (D4′). Its impls[] array is the central registered capability adapter table (#206): one row per impl, authored by that impl but registered centrally, declaring its capability id → 3-state tier map: native-ok (the platform serves it directly) / polyfill-ok (a shim recovers the behavior) / capability-hard (a UA-privileged capability no shim can reach). The adapter table is the matrix's row source — one source of truth, no duplicated capability facts; adding a new impl is a single-row registration. Capability ids key off src/_data/capabilities.json. Grounded in reports/2026-06-02-native-platform-substrate.md. Paired with the default build venue; runtime + edge venues swap in their own provider impls (#208).

impls.label: FACE — build-your-own
impls.summary: A custom element built on Form-Associated Custom Elements (ElementInternals): owns its value/validity and renders its own listbox via popover + anchor positioning. Maximum control; pays for native picker chrome and cross-root a11y it cannot reach.

impls.label: base-select — native progressive enhancement
impls.summary: A native customizable <select> opting into appearance: base-select: native picker, keyboard, a11y tree, and form submission for free; enhanced with arbitrary <option> markup where supported, degrading to a plain styled <select> otherwise.
